creator: cristianorolim@outlook.com
text:
The attached diff updates sysutils/rsyslog7-devel to version 7.5.0.

* Removed the dependency on devel/libsysinfo:
There is a workaround for getting system uptime, included it as patch.

* Simplified the patches related to "off64_t / off_t".

* As in PR 179900, I suggested the patches for the creator of Rsyslog too.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
